Denoise primaries

N-gram noise removal — separate signal from heartbeat-style repetition

v2/denoise.recent
Analysing…
How it works: Every primary record in the chosen window is fingerprinted (key + json_fingerprint(data)), and the resulting strings are scored by mean n-gram commonness — lines built from phrases that recur across the rest of the corpus. Anything scoring at or above the threshold is classified as noise and shown in the lower table; the rest is kept as signal in the upper table. Default threshold 0.85 is intentionally strict — for most operational streams a value in the 0.3–0.6 range will surface meaningful denoising.
Scanning recent primaries…
{% endblock %}
